name: @canopy/item-types
description: Cross-app item-type taxonomy + JSON Schema validation. Ships the canonical types (task, note, chat-message, supply-offer, demand-offer, lend-request, contact, calendar-event, announcement, reveal-request, neighbourhood-job) plus the standard `embeds: [{type, ref}, ...]` field. Project-namespaced under `https://canopy.org/ns#`; no schema.org dependency. Authored 2026-05-11 as part of standardisation Phase 52.1.
